diagnosis: Insights API returns empty arrays. Possible causes: (1) Quota exceeded on Google Cloud project, (2) location not verified, (3) insufficient permissions, (4) API request rate limit, (5) data retention policy.
note: GBP connector is LIVE — it successfully reaches the Google Business Profile API. The issue is that Insights data (metrics) is not available in the response. This is a data availability problem, not a connector connectivity problem.
